metadata.title: Chromi
metadata.description: An image-free 16-season color analysis studio with a customizable virtual model.
metadata.homeDescription: Find your most flattering colors with Chromi—no selfie required. Virtual model, transparent rule-based scoring, and personalized palettes.
metadata.studioDescription: Tune a virtual skin profile and run Chromi’s 16-season engine with transparent, rule-based scoring.
metadata.resultsDescription: Your personalized Chromi season match, palette, and score breakdown.
metadata.makeupLooksIndexDescription: Browse illustrated makeup routines with placement guides and product inspiration.
metadata.keywords: color analysis, seasonal color, 16 season color analysis, virtual color consultant, Chromi, skin undertone, color palette, no photo

landing.headline: Find your most flattering colors.
landing.intro: Choose a photorealistic model anchor, refine your skin profile, and discover a 16-season palette with transparent rule-based scoring.
landing.featureScoreDesc: Understand why your results are a match
landing.featureRecDesc: Colors, makeup, hair, and jewelry for you

studio.skinProfileIntro: Select the closest portrait anchor, then tune depth, undertone, saturation, and contrast for the 16-season engine.
studio.privacyNote: Image-free by design. Your choices stay private.

portrait.missing: Add realistic portraits to /public/models to enable the model studio.

results.disclaimer: This is a transparent rule-based fit, not a clinical or genetic diagnosis. Use it as a styling compass alongside what you see in the mirror.
results.alternateSub: Close runners-up from the same analysis.
results.selectedAttrsSub: Values passed into the scoring engine.
results.scoreDetailSub: The same engine scored all 16 seasonal profiles.
results.makeupLookbookIntro: See full illustrated guides with face maps, steps, and product ideas.

makeupLooks.pageSubtitle: Illustrated routines with placement guides, step-by-step flow, and product notes—perfect for translating your season into real life.
makeupLooks.detailDisclaimer: Visual guides for inspiration. Chromi is not affiliated with any brands or products shown in the artwork.

oliveNeutral.title: Neutral Olive Glow
oliveNeutral.description: A soft everyday neutral look that enhances olive undertones with balanced warmth and dimension.
oliveNeutral.imageAlt: Neutral olive glow makeup look infographic with placement guide and L’Oréal product row

purpleRadiance.title: Purple Radiance
purpleRadiance.description: A bold purple look for deeper skin with luminous highlights and confident dimension.
purpleRadiance.imageAlt: Purple radiance makeup look infographic for dark skin with warm undertone

icyRose.title: Icy Rose
icyRose.description: A cool romantic glow with icy rose blush, pearl highlight, and soft pink lips.
icyRose.imageAlt: Icy rose cool-toned makeup look infographic with placement guide

kpopInspired.title: K-Pop Inspired Look
kpopInspired.description: A fresh, dewy routine with soft pink tones, bright eyes, flushed cheeks, and gradient lips.
kpopInspired.imageAlt: K-Pop inspired makeup infographic with placement map, steps, and product guide for a youthful radiant finish

cosmetic.title: Cosmetic palette
cosmetic.subtitle: 64 color references for contour, lips, blush, eyes, and accents.

scoring.intro: Weighted rules across skin depth, undertone (cool, neutral, warm, and olive), chroma, contrast, eye structure, eye clarity, and hair depth and temperature.
